speaker: VANCE
text: This is Session Five. So far, you’ve learned how to move and how to generate force. Now we focus on something just as important. Staying safe while you do it. Defence isn’t retreat. It’s intelligence. Here is Mac.

speaker: MAC
text: Mac here. Session Five. Today is defence. Not panic. Not covering up. Small movements. Awareness. Staying present. If any of this feels unfamiliar, that’s fine. We keep it simple.

speaker: MAC
text: Start in stance. Hands up. We’re waking up the head and knees. The body stays tall. The head moves just enough. After me. Set of four. Slip left. One. Slip right. Two. Slip left. Three. Slip right. Four. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Stay loose.

speaker: MAC
text: When you slip, you’re not ducking. You’re letting the punch miss. Small bend in the knees. Head moves off the centre line. Eyes forward. You stay balanced. You stay ready.

speaker: MAC
text: After me. Set of four. Slip left. One. Slip right. Two. Slip left. Three. Slip right. Four. Reset. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Shake it out.

speaker: MAC
text: Now the roll. This deals with hooks. You’re not folding. You’re changing level. Knees bend. Hips turn. Head passes underneath. Think smooth, not deep.

speaker: MAC
text: After me. Set of four. Roll left. One. Roll right. Two. Roll left. Three. Roll right. Four. Reset. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Hands down briefly.

speaker: MAC
text: Defence matters because it puts you in position. Slip. Cross. Nothing forced. Just available. After me. Set of four. Slip. Cross. One. Slip. Cross. Two. Slip. Cross. Three. Slip. Cross. Four. Reset. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Let the arms hang.

speaker: MAC
text: Take a breath. If this felt awkward at times, that’s normal. Awareness takes practice. You stayed with it. We’re done.

speaker: VANCE
text: Session Five complete. You’re not just throwing punches now. You’re paying attention. That changes everything. Session Six builds from here. Rest up.
